description: SketchUp is a 3D modeling product from Trimble with an extension ecosystem for customizing workflows and working with SketchUp model files. Its developer materials focus on in-application Ruby extensions, a C SDK for `.skp` file access, and an MCP endpoint for agent integrations.
summary: SketchUp exposes a documented local extension-development surface via its Ruby API and C SDK docs, plus a public Trimble SketchUp MCP connect endpoint at `https://api.sketchup.com/mcp/v1/sketchup/mcp` that requires a bearer token discovered through MCP/OAuth.
